prompt:
Goal: Create a vertical modern football superstar collectible poster for Jude Bellingham, styled as a Chinese “new generation star dossier” World Cup poster with hyper-realistic action, light data-file graphics, and a career timeline.

Canvas: Tall 9:16 poster, white and deep navy palette with gold accents, high-contrast cinematic sports lighting, premium trading-card / magazine-cover design. Background is a large illuminated football stadium with mist, crowd blur, and a clean futuristic white border frame.

Main subject: A hyper-realistic young male footballer in a white kit with dark navy trim, sprinting or striking forward toward the viewer. Use an extreme low-angle perspective: one boot sole is large in the foreground, the torso dominates the center, and a white football with navy/gold markings flies toward the bottom-right foreground. Add shattered glass shards, turf debris, dust, and dynamic impact fragments around the player to create a 3D breakout effect. The player’s face is intentionally covered by a plain soft-edged rectangular blur/solid mask, matching the generated poster.

Top typography: Huge bold dark navy Chinese headline reading 祖德·贝林厄姆. Add a tiny gold crown icon centered above the headline. Under it, a smaller spaced subtitle in Chinese: “英格兰新核 · 全能中场 · 领袖锋芒”, with thin gold horizontal divider lines at both sides.

Side data panels: Use exactly 8 dark navy information cards with gold outlines and beveled corners, 4 on the left and 4 on the right. Each card contains a simple gold/white tactical diagram, radar chart, silhouette, or stat graphic plus Chinese labels.
Left column, top to bottom: 1) “伯明翰起点” with a football pitch diagram and caption “少年崭露头角 / 天赋初现”; 2) “多特蒙德时期” with tactical arrows and caption “迅速成长为中场核心 / 展现全面能力”; 3) “皇马核心” with circular radar/orbit diagram and caption “登陆顶级舞台 / 掌控比赛节奏”; 4) “英格兰主力” with pitch-position graphic and caption “国家队中流砥柱 / 角色中场重任”.
Right column, top to bottom: 5) “中场全能属性” with a hexagonal radar chart labeled “传球, 防守, 盘带, 视野, 控球, 射门”; 6) “关键比赛高光” with pitch diagram and stars, caption “大场面先生 / 决定比赛走向”; 7) “进球与助攻能力” with big stats “28+” and “22+”, bar indicators, and captions “进球”, “助攻”, “持续贡献 / 数据见证影响力”; 8) “领袖气质” with a captain silhouette and caption “冷静沉着 | 自信坚定 / 以身作则 | 带动全队”.

Bottom timeline: Add one wide dark navy and gold career timeline panel across the bottom with exactly 5 timeline points and one gold trophy icon near the right. The 5 labeled points are: “2003 / 伯明翰 / 足球启蒙”; “2019—2020 / 多特蒙德 / 崭露头角”; “2023—至今 / 皇马核心 / 中场领袖”; “2020—至今 / 英格兰主力 / 大赛担当”; “未来可期 / 足坛新传奇 / 正在书写”.

Footer: Large metallic gold Chinese slogan across the very bottom: 新生代巨星破框档案. Use embossed block lettering, navy shadow, and angular gold trim.

Visual style: Ultra-realistic sports photo composite, dramatic depth of field, sharp player and ball details, navy-and-gold infographic overlays, clean Chinese editorial typography, cinematic stadium haze, collectible poster finish. Keep all visible text in Chinese exactly as specified, avoid logos, avoid club crests, avoid watermarks, and maintain a premium World Cup star-poster feel.
